messages.text: Seeing elevated 5xx errors on the checkout API since 14:55 UTC.
Confirming. Grafana shows error rate jumped from 0.4% to 18% in the last 5 minutes.
PagerDuty incident INC-4832 triggered for checkout-api-high-5xx
I’m checking recent deploys now. Last release went out at 14:47 UTC.
Found it. The payments-service config change added a timeout that’s too low for the new retry path.
Runbook reminder: verify whether autoscaling is saturated before rollback.
Rolling back the config now and watching the error rate.
Rollback completed. Error rate is down to 0.7% and latency is recovering.
We should capture the customer impact window, detection gap, and why the timeout change escaped review.
